project_name: Combine App Prototypes into One Working App
job_title: Combine App Prototypes into One Working App
project_domain: merging a no-install HTML prototype with a mobile app and backend into one working app
key_features: prototype unification, HTML-to-app integration, mobile/backend sync, clean navigation, shared data model, testing, and release readiness
milestone_1_desc: Audit both prototypes and define merge architecture
milestone_2_desc: Unify navigation, layouts, and shared data model
milestone_3_desc: Integrate backend, sync flow, and state handling
milestone_4_desc: Test, polish, and prepare release handoff
